case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. EDEN SHERRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-13-2022 CONTINUED TO OCT-12-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100177228)
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210000031) TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210000031) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SHERRY, EDEN DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-13-2022 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-2022 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-20-2022
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210000031) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-13-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-12-2022 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
